SHORT NAME: — 
LONG NAME: PTD_FILL_CNT 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
6 
SOURCE: 
CCW (derived) 
VALUES: 
Null/missing or 1–XXXX 
COMMENT: 
The value will be null if the beneficiary was not enrolled in Part D or did not use any Part D drugs during 
the year.
